title: Use robust cipher algorithms
description: Weak or deprecated cipher algorithms like DES, 3DES, or RC4 have known vulnerabilities and should not be used for protecting sensitive data. Modern applications require strong, contemporary cipher algorithms.
recommendation: Use strong, modern cipher algorithms like AES-256 and avoid deprecated or weak ciphers.

noncompliant.description: Using deprecated or weak cipher algorithms like DES, 3DES, RC4, or weak modes like ECB makes encrypted data vulnerable to attacks.

compliant.description: Using strong, modern cipher algorithms like AES-256 with secure modes (GCM) or ChaCha20-Poly1305 with proper key derivation provides robust encryption.

checks.message: Use strong, modern cipher algorithms like AES-256 and avoid deprecated or weak ciphers.
